'''lawowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draftman|draftman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draftman|draftman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lawowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læweweth|læweweth]] || [[word:læwewej|læwewej]] || [[word:læwewesh|læwewesh]] || [[word:læwewe|læwewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lawowowoth|lawowowoth]] || [[word:lawowowoj|lawowowoj]] || [[word:lawowowosh|lawowowosh]] || [[word:lawowowo|lawowowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lawowoth|lawowoth]] || [[word:lawowoj|lawowoj]] || [[word:lawowosh|lawowosh]] || [[word:lawowo|lawowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lawofwoth|lawofwoth]] || [[word:lawofwoj|lawofwoj]] || [[word:lawofwosh|lawofwosh]] || [[word:lawofwof|lawofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lawowotho|lawowotho]] || [[word:lawowojo|lawowojo]] || [[word:lawowosho|lawowosho]] || [[word:lawowoko|lawowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lawowoth|lawowoth]] || [[word:lawowoj|lawowoj]] || [[word:lawowosh|lawowosh]] || [[word:lawowo|lawowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lawowothol|lawowothol]] || [[word:lawowojol|lawowojol]] || [[word:lawowoshol|lawowoshol]] || [[word:lawowokol|lawowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lawowothotho|lawowothotho]] || [[word:lawowojojo|lawowojojo]] || [[word:lawowoshosho|lawowoshosho]] || [[word:lawowoko|lawowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lawowothon|lawowothon]] || [[word:lawowojon|lawowojon]] || [[word:lawowoshon|lawowoshon]] || [[word:lawowokon|lawowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lawowothoro|lawowothoro]] || [[word:lawowojoro|lawowojoro]] || [[word:lawowoshoro|lawowoshoro]] || [[word:lawowokoro|lawowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
